dev.jeka.core.api.depmanagement

Class JkRepo

  • java.lang.Object
    • dev.jeka.core.api.depmanagement.JkRepo

  • public final class JkRepo
extends java.lang.Object
    Hold configuration necessary to instantiate download or upload repository

    • Nested Class Summary

      Nested Classes 
      Modifier and Type Class and Description
      static class  JkRepo.JkPublishConfig
      Configuration specific to publishing.
      static class  JkRepo.JkRepoCredentials 
      static class  JkRepo.JkRepoIvyConfig
      Configuration specific to Ivy.

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      JkRepo.JkRepoIvyConfig ivyConfig
      Configuration specific to Ivy repository.
      boolean ivyRepo 
      static java.lang.String MAVEN_CENTRAL_URL
      URL of the Maven central repository.
      static java.lang.String MAVEN_OSSRH_DEPLOY_RELEASE
      URL of the OSSRH repository for deploying released artifacts.
      static java.lang.String MAVEN_OSSRH_DOWNLOAD_AND_DEPLOY_SNAPSHOT
      URL of the OSSRH repository for both deploying snapshot and download artifacts.
      static java.lang.String MAVEN_OSSRH_DOWNLOAD_RELEASE
      URL for the OSSRH repository for downloading released artifacts.
      static java.lang.String MAVEN_OSSRH_PUBLIC_DOWNLOAD_RELEASE_AND_SNAPSHOT
      URL of the OSSRH repository for downloading both snapshot and released artifacts.
      JkRepo.JkPublishConfig publishConfig
      Configuration specific for repository for which, we want to publish on.

      Creates a repository having the specified url.

      static JkRepo ofLocal()
      Creates a Maven repository for publishing locally under [USER HOME]/.jeka/publish folder.
      static JkRepo ofLocalIvy()
      Creates an Ivy repository for publishing locally under [USER HOME]/.jeka/publish folder.

      Creates the Maven central repository.

      Creates an OSSRH repository for deploying released artifacts.

      Creates an OSSRH repository for both deploying snapshot and download artifacts.

      Creates a OSSRH repository for downloading both snapshot and released artifacts.

      • ivyConfig

        public final JkRepo.JkRepoIvyConfig ivyConfig
        Configuration specific to Ivy repository. Returns null if this configuration stands for a Maven repository.

      • publishConfig

        public final JkRepo.JkPublishConfig publishConfig
        Configuration specific for repository for which, we want to publish on.

      • ivyRepo

        public final boolean ivyRepo

    • Method Detail

      • of

        public static JkRepo of(java.lang.String url)
        Creates a repository having the specified url. If the repository is an Ivy repository than the url should start with ivy: as ivy:http://myrepolocation. If specified url is "local" then it returns the local repository.

      • of

        public static JkRepo of(java.nio.file.Path dir)
        Creates a Maven repository having the specified file location.

      • ofMavenCentral

        public static JkRepo ofMavenCentral()
        Creates the Maven central repository. If the github token is present in environment variable GITHUB_TOKEN, the credential is set up using this token .

      • ofGitHub

        public static JkRepo ofGitHub(java.lang.String owner,
                              java.lang.String repoName)

      • ofMavenOssrhDownloadAndDeploySnapshot

        public static JkRepo ofMavenOssrhDownloadAndDeploySnapshot(java.lang.String jiraId,
                                                           java.lang.String jiraPassword)
        Creates an OSSRH repository for both deploying snapshot and download artifacts.

      • ofMavenOssrhDeployRelease

        public static JkRepo ofMavenOssrhDeployRelease(java.lang.String jiraId,
                                               java.lang.String jiraPassword,
                                               JkFileSigner signer)
        Creates an OSSRH repository for deploying released artifacts.

      • ofMavenOssrhPublicDownload

        public static JkRepo ofMavenOssrhPublicDownload()
        Creates a OSSRH repository for downloading both snapshot and released artifacts.

      • ofLocal

        public static JkRepo ofLocal()
        Creates a Maven repository for publishing locally under [USER HOME]/.jeka/publish folder.

      • ofLocalIvy

        public static JkRepo ofLocalIvy()
        Creates an Ivy repository for publishing locally under [USER HOME]/.jeka/publish folder.
